prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 16472→13481→15515→11351→15971 名，近五年波动较大，2024 年大幅前移至 11351 名后 2025 年又后移至 15971 名，近两年累计后移约 4620 名；2025 年基准约 15971 名；该校在广东省物理类计划数 2021 年 305 人、2022 年 291 人、2023 年 292 人、2024 年 292 人、2025 年 286 人；2026 年计划 293 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 2.4%，扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 27 名，近年排名稳定在第 23–27 名区间，属于国内顶尖高校行列；2026 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长涉嫌严重违纪违法被查的学术不端事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 85（一般），短视频曝光量偏低；2024 年曾出现录取断档信号（中关注），2025 年有重庆某专业投档异常（低关注），整体舆情偏谨慎；冶金工程 A+、护理学 A+、材料科学与工程 A、临床医学 A-、交通运输工程 A-、计算机科学与技术 A- 等 13 个学科获评 A- 及以上，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热/推荐，与该校优势学科高度匹配；广东省 2026 年物理类考生约 45.6 万人，较 2025 年 44.0 万人增加约 1.6 万人（+3.6%），竞争加剧；省控线（本科批）近年稳定在 432–445 分区间，2025 年为 436 分，无明显异常波动；中南大学位于湖南长沙，非广东省内高校，属于跨省报考；该校在广东省物理类招生人数约占其全国总计划的较大比例（2025 年约 286 人），广东为该校重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次后移趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（约 +2.4%）、本省物理类考生增加（约 +3.6%）、声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 16236 名，区间 15736–16736 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 16472, 13481, 15515, 11351, and 15971 respectively, showing significant fluctuations over the past five years. In 2024, the ranking moved sharply forward to 11351, but then moved back to 15971 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4620 positions over the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 15971. The university's planned enrollment in Guangdong Province for the Physics Category was 305 in 2021, 291 in 2022, 292 in 2023, 292 in 2024, and 286 in 2025. For 2026, the plan is 293 students, a slight expansion of about 2.4% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking range of 23rd to 27th in recent years, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving the former president being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law in an academic misconduct incident, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with relatively low short video exposure. In 2024, there were signs of admission gaps (medium attention), and in 2025, an abnormal admission situation occurred for a major in Chongqing (low attention), with overall public opinion being cautious. Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, and 13 other disciplines have been rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular/recommended in society, closely matching the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 16,000 (+3.6%) compared to 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been stable in the range of 432–445 points in recent years, with 436 points in 2025, showing no significant abnormal fluctuations. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, not within Guangdong Province, making it a cross-provincial application. The university's enrollment of Physics Category students in Guangdong Province accounts for a relatively large proportion of its national total plan (about 286 in 2025), making Guangdong one of the university's important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion in 2026 (about +2.4%), the increase in local Physics Category candidates (about +3.6%), and the slightly negative reputation, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16236, with a range of 15736–16736.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15736–16736, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15500), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors. For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 16500), it is recommended to mainly choose stable Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 27 名，近年排名稳定在第 23–27 名区间；2026 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及原校长学术不端事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第 85（一般），曝光量偏低；中南大学优势学科以工科和医学为主，历史类招生专业（法学类、中国语言文学类、外国语言文学类、金融学类）对应的学科评估中，马克思主义理论 A- 与法学类有一定关联，其余学科未单独评级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度推荐、汉语言/中文推荐、金融/财经/经济分化观望；广东省 2026 年历史类考生约 32.62 万人，较 2025 年 29.22 万人增加约 3.4 万人（+11.6%），竞争明显加剧；省控线（本科批）2025 年为 464 分，较前几年（428–448 分）有明显上升，反映历史类竞争整体趋紧；中南大学位于湖南长沙，非广东省内高校；历史类在广东招生人数较少（约 30 人），属于该校在广东的小规模招生科类。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次 2472 名基准、2026 年小幅缩招（约 –3.2%）、本省历史类考生大幅增加（约 +11.6%）、省控线上移等因素，考生数大增对位次的上推作用大于缩招的下拉作用，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约 2444 名，区间 2200–2688 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2385→2388→2161→2359→2472, fluctuating narrowly within the 2100–2500 range; in 2023, it moved forward to 2161, and in 2025, the baseline is about 2472. The university's planned enrollment in Guangdong for History Category was 31 students each year from 2021 to 2025; in 2026, the plan is 30 students, a slight reduction of about 3.2% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 23–27 range in recent years; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president's academic misconduct incident, which may mildly suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with relatively low exposure; Central South University's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering and medicine, while the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Finance) have corresponding discipline evaluations where Marxist Theory is A- and somewhat related to Law, while other disciplines are not individually rated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Finance/Economics is divided with a wait-and-see approach; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong is about 326,200, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) in 2025 was 464 points, a clear increase from previous years (428–448 points), reflecting overall tightening competition in History Category; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, not a university within Guangdong; the number of History Category enrollments in Guangdong is small (about 30), making it a small-scale enrollment category for the university in Guangdong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking baseline of 2472, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (about –3.2%), a significant increase in local History Category examinees (about +11.6%), and an upward shift in the provincial control line, the upward push on rankings from the increase in examinees outweighs the downward pull from enrollment reduction. It is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2444, with a range of 2200–2688.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2100), you can focus on reaching for Law. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 2600), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 as a stable option.
